title: Vegetarian Turkish Kofte with Malted Chocolate Sauce
description: A unique twist on traditional Turkish kofte, served with a rich and creamy malted chocolate sauce.
instructions: In a pan, melt 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped romantic and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the pre-cooked kofte and cook for 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
In a separate saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons of oil over low heat.
Add the unsweetened cocoa powder and whisk until smooth.
Gradually add 2 tablespoons of water, whisking continuously.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, until thickened.
Stir in the malted powder and cook for an additional minute.
Serve the kofte with the malted chocolate sauce.
